The '''Coruscant Health Office''' was a health agency active on the [[planet]] [[Coruscant]] during the [[Republic Era|reign]] of the [[Galactic Republic]]. It controlled outbreaks of [[disease]] effectively in the world's [[spaceport]]s, where they were frequent due to the risk of contagion. However, the quarantine restrictions enacted by the office slowed down the already complicated process of managing the constant flow of new arrivals into Coruscant, which acted as a nexus for many different worlds.<ref name="Coruscant" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], the Coruscant Health Office was mentioned in "[[Coruscant (reference book)|Coruscant]]," an entry in [[De Agostini]]'s [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']] series<ref name="Coruscant" /> that was released on [[February 9]], [[2021]].<ref name="De Agostini Spain">{{DeAgostini|url=libros-comics/enciclopedia-star-wars|text=Enciclopedia Star Wars}}</ref> The [[Coruscant Health Office/Legends|Coruscant Health Office]] originated in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, where it was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #49'']],<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|news/13328_1.html|Palpatine forms Loyalist Committee}}</ref> a [[March 28]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN49 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> issue published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website.<ref name="HNN" /> The article was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
